scenarios.name: Election Impact Assessment
scenarios.description: A major election outcome shifts the political landscape, threatening corporate strategy assumptions. Organizations must assess policy implications and adapt strategic plans.

customization.context: Leading corporate response to political transition
Reassessing strategic assumptions and scenarios
Engaging with new administration and policy priorities
Advising on incoming administration policy agenda
Assessing regulatory and legal environment changes
Advocating for social and environmental policy priorities

round_structure: Election outcome briefing: Policy platform analysis
Sector impact assessment: Industry-specific implications
Regulatory forecast: Agency leadership and agenda priorities
Tax and fiscal policy: Budget and legislative priorities
Trade and international: Foreign policy implications
Stakeholder mapping: New power centers and influencers
Scenario planning: Best, base, and worst case outcomes
Strategic adaptation: Corporate positioning and response

required: Election results and government composition
Campaign policy platform commitments
Sector regulatory exposure analysis
Key appointee backgrounds and priorities

environment_config.decision_mechanism: Executive committee with government affairs input
environment_config.escalation_trigger: Major policy threat triggers emergency response

scenarios.name: Trade War Escalation
scenarios.description: Tariff escalation between major economies disrupts supply chains, market access, and cost structures. Companies must evaluate sourcing alternatives and market strategies.

customization.context: Navigating trade conflict impact on global operations
Managing sourcing disruption and logistics challenges
Modeling tariff costs and margin impact
Advocating for tariff relief and trade solutions
Facilitating bilateral trade discussions
Managing market access and local operations

round_structure: Tariff impact assessment: Product and market exposure
Supply chain vulnerability: Concentration and dependency analysis
Sourcing alternatives: Supplier diversification options
Pricing strategy: Cost pass-through vs. absorption
Market access evaluation: Revenue at risk by geography
Government engagement: Exclusion requests and advocacy
Operational restructuring: Nearshoring and reshoring
Strategic positioning: Long-term trade architecture

required: Tariff schedules and product classifications
Supply chain mapping and country of origin data
Revenue exposure by affected market
Alternative supplier capabilities and costs

environment_config.decision_mechanism: Executive committee with supply chain and finance input
environment_config.escalation_trigger: Critical supply disruption triggers emergency response
environment_config.coalition_dynamics: Cost efficiency vs. supply resilience priorities

scenarios.name: Sanctions Response Planning
scenarios.description: New sanctions regime impacts global operations, customer relationships, and financial flows. Organizations must ensure compliance while minimizing business disruption.

customization.context: Managing sanctions compliance and business continuity
Implementing sanctions screening and controls
Advising on sanctions law and enforcement risks
Managing affected business relationships
Enforcing sanctions compliance and investigating violations
Advising on diplomatic implications and waivers

round_structure: Sanctions briefing: Scope and applicability analysis
Exposure assessment: Customers, suppliers, and transactions
Compliance gap analysis: Current controls vs. requirements
Business impact evaluation: Revenue and relationship risks
Wind-down planning: Contractual and operational exits
License and waiver strategy: Exemption applications
Systems and controls: Screening and monitoring enhancements
Training and communication: Organization-wide awareness

required: Full text of sanctions regulations and guidance
Customer and supplier screening against sanctions lists
Transaction flow analysis for affected jurisdictions
Current sanctions compliance program documentation

environment_config.decision_mechanism: Compliance committee with board risk oversight
environment_config.escalation_trigger: Potential violation discovery triggers immediate response
environment_config.coalition_dynamics: Business retention vs. strict compliance priorities

scenarios.name: Policy Reform Impact
scenarios.description: Major regulatory or policy reform (healthcare, energy, tax) fundamentally changes industry economics. Companies must assess strategic implications and adaptation requirements.

customization.context: Leading company through fundamental policy transformation
Evaluating strategic repositioning options
Coordinating industry response to policy reform
Shaping and implementing policy reform
Modeling financial impact of policy changes
Advocating for public interest in policy outcomes

round_structure: Policy reform briefing: Legislative text and implementation timeline
Economic impact modeling: Cost and revenue implications
Competitive landscape: Winners and losers analysis
Strategic option generation: Adaptation and pivot scenarios
Stakeholder engagement: Coalition building and advocacy
Implementation planning: Operational and system changes
Scenario testing: Sensitivity and contingency planning
Strategic commitment: Resource allocation decisions

required: Draft or enacted policy reform legislation
Industry economic model and baseline projections
Implementation timeline and regulatory guidance
Competitor positioning and response analysis

environment_config.decision_mechanism: Executive committee with policy advisory input
environment_config.escalation_trigger: Adverse policy finalization triggers immediate response
environment_config.coalition_dynamics: Industry unity vs. competitive opportunism tensions

scenarios.name: Geopolitical Crisis Response
scenarios.description: Regional conflict disrupts supply chains, energy flows, and market stability. Organizations must ensure employee safety, business continuity, and strategic adaptation.

customization.context: Leading crisis response and business continuity
Managing employee safety and asset protection
Managing supply disruption and alternative sourcing
Coordinating with government evacuation and support
Facilitating safe passage and consular support
Managing internal and external crisis communications

round_structure: Crisis briefing: Conflict status and affected operations
Employee safety assessment: Evacuation and protection needs
Supply chain disruption: Critical path and alternative sourcing
Asset protection: Facilities, inventory, and IP security
Government coordination: Diplomatic and military support
Business continuity: Critical function maintenance
Financial impact: Insurance, write-offs, and recovery costs
Strategic repositioning: Market exit or temporary suspension
Recovery planning: Post-crisis re-entry strategy

required: Crisis situation reports and conflict mapping
Employee locations and evacuation plans
Supply chain exposure to affected region
Asset inventory and insurance coverage
optional: Government travel advisory and support options

environment_config.decision_mechanism: Crisis management team with board notification
environment_config.escalation_trigger: Employee safety threat triggers immediate evacuation
environment_config.coalition_dynamics: Employee safety vs. business continuity priorities

scenarios.name: Climate Policy Transition
scenarios.description: Carbon pricing or cap-and-trade implementation transforms industry economics. Companies must assess carbon exposure, compliance strategies, and competitive positioning.

customization.context: Leading decarbonization strategy and carbon compliance
Developing carbon reduction and offset strategies
Modeling carbon cost impact and compliance economics
Engaging on carbon pricing design and implementation
Implementing carbon pricing and monitoring compliance
Advocating for ambitious climate action and transparency

round_structure: Policy briefing: Carbon pricing mechanism and timeline
Carbon footprint assessment: Scope 1, 2, and 3 emissions
Cost impact modeling: Carbon price scenarios and pass-through
Abatement opportunity analysis: Reduction options and costs
Compliance strategy: Allowances, offsets, and trading
Competitive positioning: Carbon intensity vs. peers
Stakeholder engagement: Policy advocacy and disclosure
Transition planning: Net-zero pathway and milestones

required: Carbon pricing legislation and regulatory guidance
Greenhouse gas emissions inventory and verification
Abatement cost curve and reduction opportunities
Carbon market price forecasts and trading mechanisms

environment_config.coalition_dynamics: Minimum compliance vs. climate leadership ambitions

scenarios.name: Technology Regulation Wave
scenarios.description: Comprehensive technology regulation covering AI, data privacy, and antitrust fundamentally changes digital business models. Tech companies must navigate multi-dimensional compliance.

customization.context: Navigating comprehensive tech regulatory transformation
Implementing AI governance and data protection
Managing antitrust, privacy, and AI regulatory compliance
Ensuring data governance and privacy compliance
Enforcing AI, privacy, and competition regulations
Advocating for user rights and algorithmic accountability

round_structure: Regulatory landscape briefing: AI, privacy, and antitrust requirements
AI governance: Algorithmic transparency and accountability
Data protection: Privacy by design and user rights
Antitrust assessment: Market power and remedy implications
Business model impact: Revenue and growth implications
Technical implementation: Architecture and system changes
Competitive positioning: Compliance as advantage or burden
Stakeholder engagement: Regulatory dialogue and advocacy
Implementation roadmap: Phased compliance and investment

required: Draft or enacted tech regulation texts
AI system inventory and risk classification
Data processing records and privacy impact assessments
Market share and competitive analysis

environment_config.decision_mechanism: Executive committee with legal and technology input
environment_config.escalation_trigger: Enforcement action or major fine triggers emergency response
environment_config.coalition_dynamics: Innovation speed vs. regulatory compliance tensions
